name: Log Sources Configuration
description: Log sources configuration page (/configure/log-sources). Same runner-gating pattern as configure-hooks: in CI with no runner, useRunnerHealth returns isOffline=true and the page renders its offline state with the 'Log Sources' heading plus RunnerOfflineState. Locally with a responsive backend, the page renders its full settings form (61 elements confirmed via dump), but the CI spec targets the offline baseline. Ports configure.spec.ts log-sources section. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Page heading
states.description: The 'Log Sources' heading renders in both offline and online states.

assertions.description: 'Log Sources' heading — universal across offline/online states.

states.name: Runner offline state
states.description: RunnerOfflineState rendered when no runner is available in CI.
